title: All Is Fine in '89
overview: November 9, 1989 - With the backdrop of the Berlin Wall being torn down and the Cold War coming to an end, the senior students - and even teachers - at Romano High are obliviously prepping for the last field party of the decade - and for some, the last party of their lives.
